title: Roman Craft: Armors Weapons and Shield
description: Adds roman armor, weapon and shield
body:
This mod aims to make the player feel like a roman soldier. At the moment, the modification contains 13 distinct helmets, 18 types of armors and tunics, 24 types of weapons and 20 types of shield, most of which can be made from 28 available materials: bronze, tin, linen and threads.

![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdd85ac6260e261e19c9a522147151bbc36fda93.png)

Roman Craft: Armor is a unique Minecraft mod that introduces the elegance and durability of Roman armor into the game. With this mod, players can craft and equip themselves with a variety of historically-inspired Roman armor sets, including the iconic Lorica Segmentata, the classic Galea helmet, and various types of Roman shields. Each piece of armor is designed not only to provide protection but also to immerse players in the world of ancient Rome, offering both functional benefits and a rich visual experience.

With Roman Craft: Armor, you'll not only enhance your gameplay with historically accurate armor but also experience the thrill of battle in a completely new way. The mod offers various difficulty levels, ensuring that both beginner and advanced players can enjoy the excitement of crafting, wearing, and fighting in this Roman-inspired armor. Whether you're defending your base or battling mobs, you'll feel like a true Roman soldier ready to conquer the world of Minecraft.

![Armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69d9c5593b0dec7be6de919df6e85b11d36d3dd8.png)

![Armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc473c2fb17db15d891ed5cfa59cfbe25063c6d8.png)

![ws](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddcd49bf0806c8ba77d897f4e0e0b2578a55764c.png)

![ws](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e73f73120ae78f71e4efcfc7d8f969755d451577.png)

Report any bugs that you may find.

Popularity Update:

100 Downloads - 04/04/2025
